text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Training starts at… Yeah, I should 
be able to make it.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
"——Announcement to all passengers. 
Presently, a herd of deers have bypassed 
onto the train tracks. All services are hereby 
suspen—"

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Oh, that seems intense. Hmmm, whaaat to do now then…

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Well, no need to be anxious. 
Guess I'll go for a stroll then.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
Even so, this is a great station to 
be getting off at～

Through this and that, Stay Gold 
completely forgot about training 
and slacked off for the rest of the day.
